The suit seeks to compel compliance with civil rights law and recover federal funds.

Speaking at Nvidia's GTC Conference, Huang drew a firm line between legitimate safety concerns and manufactured catastrophism, urging industry leaders to stop scaring people about technology he calls "computer software."

The shipment aims to support the treatment and recovery of those injured in the March 16 attack, which reportedly killed over 400 people. India reiterated its solidarity with the Afghan people and commitment to humanitarian support.

Jadeja’s amused reaction went viral. After a poor 2025 season, RR hope such moments signal a turnaround, with new additions and young talents boosting confidence ahead of the campaign.

description: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee released the TMC's election manifesto, accusing the BJP of conspiracies to capture the state and weaken institutions. She unveiled '10 Protigya' pledges focusing on welfare, jobs, housing, and infrastructure, promising enhanced financial aid for women and support for youth and farmers. Elections are scheduled for April 23 and April 29.

The controversy has sparked backlash, highlighting concerns over privacy, online harassment, and the growing toxicity of viral confrontations.

Despite an ‘A’ rating and a massive 3-hour 49-minute runtime, the film is on track to cross the Rs. 230 crore global gross mark by the end of Day 2.

Iran's F-35 'hit' shakes the myth of US 'sky ghost' - why it could be turning point
description: A US F-35 stealth fighter jet sustained damage during a mission over Iran. The aircraft made an emergency landing safely. Iran claims its air defence systems hit the advanced jet. This incident is under investigation. The F-35 is a highly advanced stealth aircraft. This event could signal improvements in Iran's defence capabilities.

title: Piers Morgan wife Celia Walden sleep remark resurfaces as HSTikkyTokky interview turns personal
description: Piers Morgan walked off his show after a heated clash with Harrison Sullivan turned personal. The situation escalated when Sullivan mentioned Celia Walden, leading to Morgan ending the interview. Soon after, Walden’s old 2021 quote asking for her husband to return to work went viral again, adding another layer to the already widely shared moment.

title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink says AI is leading to a crisis and it is not mass layoffs
description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink warns that current college graduates may face high unemployment due to rapid AI adoption disrupting entry-level white-collar jobs.  He highlights a societal lag in adapting to technological change, while also noting AI's creation of new opportunities in skilled trades, for which society is unprepared.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
description: Meta is ending its virtual reality social network Horizon Worlds on Quest headsets. The app will be removed from the Quest store by March 2026 and fully discontinued on VR devices by June 2026. Horizon Worlds will then operate solely as a mobile application.
